title: Intellia Q1 2026 Results: 87% Fewer HAE Attacks vs Placebo
text: Intellia Therapeutics reported business updates and financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026. Q1 2026 showed revenue of US$15.0 million and a basic EPS loss of US$0.81. Revenues beat forecasts by 9.0%, and statutory losses were 9.0% smaller than analysts expected. Q1 2026 net loss narrowed to $96.2M from $114.3M year over year. The company achieved a historic milestone by presenting the world's first Phase 3 data for an in vivo gene editing candidate and initiated a rolling BLA submission. The company also recently resumed patient screening for both Phase 3 clinical trials in ATTR and strengthened its balance sheet with an underwritten public offering. The company's existing cash resources are expected to fund its operations at least into 2028 and well beyond lonvo-z's anticipated U.S. commercial launch for HAE in the first half of 2027. Cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities were $517.2M on March 31, 2026, plus approximately $207M gross from an April equity offering, funding operations at least into 2028.
